author: lOrm
content:
VERIFIED-DUP-OF-FIXED (closed via #502 hardening). Forensic grep on main @3a19163f:

```
$ grep -n 'neutralize_reminder_delimiters\|replace_case_insensitive' src/context.rs
(no matches)

$ grep -rn 'neutralize_reminder_delimiters\|replace_case_insensitive' src/
(no matches anywhere in tree)

$ grep -n 'xml_escape_for_prompt' src/context.rs
131:pub fn xml_escape_for_prompt(s: &str) -> Cow<'_, str> {
164:    let sanitized = xml_escape_for_prompt(content);
```

The O(n*k) lowercase-per-delimiter function was replaced by `xml_escape_for_prompt` (single-pass Cow-returning escape) as part of #502's prompt-injection hardening. The perf pathology this issue describes no longer exists in the codebase. Closing as duplicate-of-fixed.
